name: Sole Romesco
recipeInstructions:
1. To make sauce: In a blender or food processor, blend tomatoes, chilies, hazelnuts, garlic, mint, and salt. Add half the oil, drop by drop, until the mixture is thick. With the motor running, add the rest of the oil in a steady stream. Turn off the motor. Stir in sherry and vinegar. Set aside.
2. Rinse and dry sole fillets.
3. Combine flour and salt with pepper. Dust the fillets with seasoned flour and dip them in oil or butter.
4. Place fillets on hot barbecue grill. After 2 to 3 minutes, turn carefully with a metal spatula.
5. After another 2 to 3 minutes, turn the fillets again.
6. While the fish is cooking, pour sauce into a bowl and sprinkle with parsley.
7. Serve spooned over piping hot fillets. Makes 4 servings.
